title: eragrostis poiformis
intro: Eragrostis poiformis, also known as Blue Grama Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis poiformis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting immune function. Eragrostis poiformis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat various health issues.
